app.title: Learner Mapping Questionnaire - Yuvilab Spark
intro.2: I’m Yubi, and I’m here to get to know you a little better 😊
intro.3: In a moment we’ll go through a few short questions that help me understand how you learn best:
intro.4: What interests you, what helps you, and how you feel while learning.
intro.5: There are no right or wrong answers — just answer what feels true for you.
intro.6: Ready? It will only take a few minutes ✨
section.0: Let’s start! Tell me a little about what interests you in learning
section.1: Great. Now I want to hear how you handle challenges
section.2: Nice. Now we’ll talk about responsibility, initiative, and planning
section.3: Good. Now we’ll check how you pause, plan, and calm yourself when needed
section.4: Almost there. A few questions about what you know about yourself as a learner
section.5: Last part: your environment, support, and computer learning
question.microcopy: There are no right or wrong answers — choose what fits you best 💜
complete.title: {studentName}, I got to know you a little better 💜
complete.subtitle: I’ll use your answers to adapt tasks, explanations, and support for you later.
fallback.summary: Thanks for your answers! Is there anything else important you want me to know?
fallback.chat: Thanks for sharing! I wrote that down. Is there anything else you want to tell me?
dashboard.loading.title: Yubi is building your dashboard... 🧠
dashboard.loading.subtitle: Analyzing your mapping data and preparing personal insights
dashboard.noData.title: No mapping data yet
dashboard.noData.subtitle: To see your personal dashboard, first fill out the questionnaire
dashboard.error.title: Error loading the dashboard
dashboard.error.subtitle: Try refreshing the page
dashboard.home.greetingSub: Today we'll continue right where you left off
dashboard.home.goalDefault2: Write at the end of each task what helped me
dashboard.home.noDifficulties: No topics currently need extra strengthening 🎉
dashboard.home.agencyHighlight: Your standout strength: {name} — keep it up! 🌟
dashboard.home.stepDoneToast: Well done! You marked a step complete 🎉
dashboard.home.stepDoneToastSub: Every small step brings you closer to your goal
dashboard.subjects.title: 📚 My subjects
dashboard.subjects.loadingSub: Loading your subjects in a moment 💜
dashboard.subjects.hintSub: The subject in the center is active — scroll with the arrows or click a subject on the side 🚀
dashboard.goals.title: 🎯 My goals
dashboard.goals.subtitle: Your meeting documentation with the teacher — click a card for the full record and a smart summary ✨
dashboard.goals.emptySubtitle: After you meet with your teacher, you can document here what you talked about, what you learned, and next steps 💜
dashboard.strengths.title: 💪 My strengths
dashboard.strengths.subtitle: Everything I'm good at — click each one for an explanation
dashboard.strengths.interestExplain: Something you love — we'll combine it into learning
dashboard.strengths.prefExplain: This is more comfortable for you to learn with
dashboard.learning.title: 🧭 How I learn
dashboard.learning.subtitle: The way that suits me best for learning
dashboard.learning.styleDefault: Learning at a personal pace with lots of examples
dashboard.learning.hurts2: A lot of text at once
dashboard.agency.title: 🧭 My agency compass
dashboard.agency.subtitle: The strengths that help you learn — click each one to learn more 💜
dashboard.hero.subtitle.science: A short exploration of plants and the environment
dashboard.hero.subtitle.language: A short story and creative writing
dashboard.hero.subtitle.default: A short task that fits you perfectly
dashboard.strengthLine.persistence: Keeps going even when it's a bit challenging
dashboard.strengthLine.collaboration: Finds it easy to work and share with others
dashboard.strengthLine.tech: Gets along great with digital tools
dashboard.strengthLine.focus: Manages to focus on the task
dashboard.strengthLine.motivation: You have the drive to try and progress
dashboard.strengthLine.default: This is one of your biggest strengths
dashboard.improve.title.tech: Feeling more confident with digital tools
dashboard.improve.how.focus: We'll work in short sessions with small breaks between tasks.
dashboard.improve.how.tech: We'll start with short tasks using one tool at a time, no pressure.
dashboard.improve.how.organization: We'll use a short list of steps before starting.
dashboard.improve.how.default: We'll progress one small step at a time, and Yubi is with you along the way.
dashboard.chatPane.title: 💬 My chat with teachers
dashboard.chatPane.subtitle: You can write to your teachers, ask questions, and schedule meetings

dashboard.yubi.bubbleSubtitle: Do you have a question or something on your mind?

dashboard.yubi.voiceAgain: Press again to talk with Yubi 🎤
dashboard.hero.message: Hi {first}! 👋 I noticed there's something small worth strengthening in {subject} today. I prepared a short 15-minute task for you{link} — want to try together? 💪
dashboard.hero.messageLink: that connects to {interest}, which you love
